creator: girgen@partitur.se
text:
Reposting, since I failed to submit a proper subject... :-/

Here's an update of the lesstif port to 0.88.0

Since this version includes support for Motif 2.0, it has a major
change in the file hierarchy: The libs and includes are in /usr/X11R6/Lesstif, and are
symlinked from /usr/X11R6/[lib|include]
